VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.label: gravpilot
VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.description: Dedicated astrogation and flight-control routines are wired straight into this android's frame - the built-in equivalent of a pilot-assistant implant. They make it a markedly better gravship and shuttle pilot.

VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.label: delicate frame
VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.description: This android is built on a lightweight frame of thin, minimal plating. It is cheap to run, but the flimsy chassis buckles under punishment, taking significantly more damage from all incoming attacks.

VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.label: spacer
VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.description: This android's chassis is fully sealed against the void: hardened seals bring its vacuum resistance to 100%, and internal heat stores keep it running in the cold of space, so it needs no spacesuit and never suffers component freezing out there.

VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.label: sleep cycle
VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.description: This android runs a full biomimetic sleep cycle: it builds up fatigue and has to rest or sleep like an organic to keep operating. Idling through a sleep cycle draws very little power, so the frame runs more efficiently.

VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.label: occultist
VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.description: Forbidden subroutines let this android interface with the dark and the anomalous. It is the only android that can take part in psychic rituals - including being the subject of an infused death refusal - and the only one able to capture, contain and study entities. Studying still requires that the android is not incapable of Intellectual.
